doc_paths: lab4-dns/DNS 攻击实验 - 远程攻击.md

materials_checks.label: 远程实验指导文档
materials_checks.path: lab4-dns/DNS 攻击实验 - 远程攻击.md

execution_steps: 迁移 Labsetup 到远端标准工作区
使用 Compose 重建 DNS 远程攻击环境
生成 Kaminsky 请求与响应模板
运行攻击并验证缓存与 dig 结果
生成 Markdown 报告与 quiz
quiz_prompts: Kaminsky 攻击为什么要不断更换随机子域名？
为什么远程缓存投毒要同时考虑速度和 Transaction ID？
混合使用 Scapy 与 C 相比纯 Python 的核心收益是什么？

materials.路径: lab4-dns/DNS 攻击实验 - 远程攻击.md
lab4-dns/DNS 攻击实验 - 远程攻击.md

checks.详情:
dcbuild is aliased to `docker-compose build'
dcup is aliased to `docker-compose up'
dcdown is aliased to `docker-compose down'
dockps is aliased to `docker ps --format "{{.ID}}  {{.Names}}" | sort -k 2'
docksh is a function
docksh () 
{ 
    docker exec -it $1 /bin/bash
}
运行容器数=4; 残留网络=seed-net

steps.actual_command: ssh -i /Users/zzw4257/.ssh/seed-way -p 2345 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 seed@localhost bash -lc 'docker ps -q | wc -l | tr -d '"'"' '"'"''

steps.title: 运行 Kaminsky 攻击 attempt 1
steps.description: 在宿主机上以 sudo 运行编译后的攻击程序，利用随机子域名反复触发并投毒
steps.actual_command: ssh -i /Users/zzw4257/.ssh/seed-way -p 2345 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 seed@localhost bash -lc 'cd /home/seed/seed-labs/lab4-dns-remote/workspace/labsetup/volumes && echo dees | sudo -S timeout 30s ./attack > attack-run.log 2>&1 || true'
steps.result_preview:
** WARNING: connection is not using a post-quantum key exchange algorithm.
** This session may be vulnerable to "store now, decrypt later" attacks.
** The server may need to be upgraded. See https://openssh.com/pq.html

steps.title: 远程攻击缓存导出 attempt 1
steps.description: 导出本地 DNS 服务器缓存以便留档分析
steps.human_command: 相当于 docksh lo 后执行: rndc dumpdb -cache >/dev/null 2>&1 && cat /var/cache/bind/dump.db
steps.actual_command: ssh -i /Users/zzw4257/.ssh/seed-way -p 2345 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 seed@localhost bash -lc 'docker exec local-dns-server-10.9.0.53 bash -lc '"'"'rndc dumpdb -cache >/dev/null 2>&1 && cat /var/cache/bind/dump.db'"'"''
steps.result_preview:

steps.title: 远程攻击缓存筛选 attempt 1
steps.description: 筛选缓存中的关键 NS 记录
steps.human_command: 相当于 docksh lo 后执行: grep -n 'attacker32.com\|example.com' /var/cache/bind/dump.db || true
steps.actual_command: ssh -i /Users/zzw4257/.ssh/seed-way -p 2345 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 seed@localhost bash -lc 'docker exec local-dns-server-10.9.0.53 bash -lc '"'"'grep -n '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'attacker32.com\|example.com'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' /var/cache/bind/dump.db || true'"'"''

steps.title: 读取 Kaminsky 攻击日志 attempt 1
steps.description: 从宿主机挂载目录读取攻击程序日志
steps.actual_command: ssh -i /Users/zzw4257/.ssh/seed-way -p 2345 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 seed@localhost bash -lc 'cd /home/seed/seed-labs/lab4-dns-remote/workspace/labsetup/volumes && tail -n 40 attack-run.log || true'

steps.title: 验证远程攻击结果
steps.description: 从用户容器执行 dig 验证命令
steps.human_command: 相当于 docksh us 后执行: dig +short www.example.com && dig +short @ns.attacker32.com www.example.com
steps.actual_command: ssh -i /Users/zzw4257/.ssh/seed-way -p 2345 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 seed@localhost bash -lc 'docker exec user-10.9.0.5 bash -lc '"'"'dig +short www.example.com && dig +short @ns.attacker32.com www.example.com'"'"''
steps.result_preview:
1.2.3.5
1.2.3.5

steps.title: 收尾关闭环境
steps.description: 在证据收集完成后关闭 compose 环境，避免脏状态残留
steps.actual_command: ssh -i /Users/zzw4257/.ssh/seed-way -p 2345 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 seed@localhost bash -lc 'cd /home/seed/seed-labs/lab4-dns-remote/workspace/labsetup && docker-compose down --remove-orphans'
